---
title: "PDF Downloads"
---

# PDF Downloads

[Download all presentations](pdfs/all-presentations.pdf){.btn .btn-primary download="all-presentations.pdf"}

## Monday

| Presentation | Slides | PDF |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Welcome | [Open](welcome.qmd) | [Download](pdfs/01-welcome.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm download="01-welcome.pdf"} |
| Introduction | [Open](Introduction/index.qmd) | [Download](pdfs/02-introduction.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm download="02-introduction.pdf"} |
| OmopSketch | [Open](OmopSketch/index.qmd) | [Download](pdfs/03-omop-sketch.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm download="03-omop-sketch.pdf"} |

## Tuesday

| Presentation | Slides | PDF |
| --- | --- | --- |
| CohortConstructor | [Open](CohortConstructor/index.qmd) | [Download](pdfs/04-cohort-constructor.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm download="04-cohort-constructor.pdf"} |
| PhenotypeR | [Open](PhenotypeR/index.qmd) | [Download](pdfs/05-phenotype-r.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm download="05-phenotype-r.pdf"} |

## Wednesday

| Presentation | Slides | PDF |
| --- | --- | --- |
| PatientProfiles | [Open](PatientProfiles/index.qmd) | [Download](pdfs/06-patient-profiles.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm download="06-patient-profiles.pdf"} |
| CohortCharacteristics | [Open](CohortCharacteristics/index.qmd) | [Download](pdfs/07-cohort-characteristics.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm download="07-cohort-characteristics.pdf"} |

## Thursday

| Presentation | Slides | PDF |
| --- | --- | --- |
| DrugUtilisation | [Open](DrugUtilisation/index.qmd) | [Download](pdfs/08-drug-utilisation.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm download="08-drug-utilisation.pdf"} |
| IncidencePrevalence | [Open](IncidencePrevalence/index.qmd) | [Download](pdfs/09-incidence-prevalence.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm download="09-incidence-prevalence.pdf"} |
| Final remarks | [Open](final_remarks.qmd) | [Download](pdfs/10-final-remarks.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm download="10-final-remarks.pdf"} |
